case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. ACME BUILDING MAINTENANCE CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ACME BUILDING MAINTENANCE CO., INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ACME BUILDING MAINTENANCE CO., INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACME BUILDING MAINTENANCE CO., INC. $34,589.45 PRINCIPAL, $8,254.15 INTEREST, $13,835.78 TAX PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $56,679.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
